attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.PACKOUT_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.PACKOUT_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.PO_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.PO_LINE_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.SO_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.SO_LINE_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.MODEL_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.PACKOUT_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.SHIPSET_NUM, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.UNPACKOUT_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.PACKOUT_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.PROCESS_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.PROCESSING_MODULE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.ERROR_MESSAGE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.ERROR_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.CONTAINER_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT,
 (
 select PACKOUT_NUMBER ,PO_NUMBER ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT
 minus
 select PACKOUT_NUMBER ,PO_NUMBER ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.PACKOUT_NUMBER = STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.PACKOUT_NUMBER and ACM.PO_NUMBER=STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.PO_NUMBER and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_SG_PACKOUT)
